summary: Tested new features: (1) Sticky floating headers on Inventory and Manage tables - WORKING, (2) Column sorting in Manage tab with click-to-sort and ▲/▼ indicators - WORKING, (3) Recipe CRUD API with ingredients and fixed costs - ALL WORKING (32 backend tests pass), (4) Recipe UI with cost calculation - WORKING, (5) Item Profits table in Accounting tab - WORKING. All 5 tabs (COUNT, INVENTORY, ORDERS, MANAGE, ACCOUNTING) fully functional.

issues: Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for {DialogContent} - minor accessibility improvement

passed_tests: Sticky headers (Manage tab): Header row (Name, Category, Sub-Cat, Vendor, etc.) remains visible at top while scrolling through 81 items
Sticky headers (Inventory tab): Header row (Item, Have, Cases, Target, Need, Order, Vendor) remains visible while scrolling
Column sorting (Name): Click Name header shows ▲ ascending, click again shows ▼ descending, third click removes sort
Column sorting (฿/Unit): Click ฿/Unit header sorts numerically ascending/descending
Column sorting within groups: Items sort within their category groups, not globally
Recipe CRUD - GET /api/recipes: Returns array of recipes (initially empty)
Recipe CRUD - POST /api/recipes: Creates recipe with name, sale_price, ingredients[], fixed_costs[]
Recipe CRUD - PUT /api/recipes/{id}: Updates recipe successfully, returns 404 for nonexistent
Recipe CRUD - DELETE /api/recipes/{id}: Deletes recipe, returns 404 for nonexistent
Recipe with ingredients: Item selection dropdown, servings_per_unit, servings_used fields work
Recipe with fixed costs: Default 'Ice' ฿2 cost, ability to add more fixed costs
Recipe cost calculation: Total Cost = sum(item.cost_per_unit * servings_used / servings_per_unit) + sum(fixed_costs)
Recipe profit display: Shows Cost, Sale, Profit, Margin% in recipe list
Recipe dialog UI: Name, Sale Price, +Add Ingredient, +Add Cost, Save Recipe buttons all functional
Item Profits table: Items with sale_price > 0 show in table with Cost, Sale, Profit (green), Margin columns
Item Profits empty state: Shows 'Set sale prices in Manage tab to see profits here' when no items have sale_price
All 32 backend pytest tests pass (12 original + 7 features + 13 new recipe tests)
critical_code_review_comments: Recipe model includes all required fields: id, name, sale_price, ingredients[], fixed_costs[]
RecipeIngredient model has item_id, item_name, servings_per_unit, servings_used - enables cost calculation
RecipeFixedCost model has name and cost fields
calcRecipeCost function correctly calculates: sum(item.cost * servings_used / servings_per_unit) + sum(fixed_costs)
Manage tab thead has 'sticky top-0 z-10' classes for proper sticky behavior
toggleManageSort cycles through: asc -> desc -> null (removes sort) correctly
getSortedGroupItems sorts within groups, not across all items - correct implementation

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all new features verified working via Playwright)

seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up: TEST_* items via pytest fixtures, 'Test Bucket' recipe via UI, Big Leo sale_price=90 for Item Profits testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: New features verified: (1) Sticky headers on Inventory/Manage tabs use 'overflow-auto max-h-[70vh]' container + 'sticky top-0 z-10' thead. (2) Manage column sorting via toggleManageSort(), getSortedGroupItems() - shows ▲/▼ indicators. (3) Recipe API at /api/recipes supports full CRUD with ingredients and fixed_costs arrays. (4) Recipe dialog allows selecting inventory items as ingredients with servings_per_unit and servings_used for cost calculation. (5) Item Profits table filters items where sale_price > 0. Test file test_recipes_and_sorting.py added with 13 tests for recipe features. App has 81 items, 10+ sessions. All 32 backend tests pass.
